title: Deliciously Aerated Ethiopian Melon Salad
description: A refreshing and festive Ethiopian dish featuring melons, temper, and low-sodium-friendly ingredients, perfect for warm weather gatherings.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the diced watermelon, honeydew melon, and casaba melon.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, berbere spice, and salt-free seasoning blend.
Pour the dressing over the melon mixture and toss to coat.
Sprinkle the chopped fresh mint leaves and thinly sliced red onion over the top of the salad.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, use a fork to gently aerate the salad, breaking up any clumps and releasing the flavors.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional fresh mint leaves if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
